descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes prepare to face Red Deer Rustlers in opening Centennial Cup tier two series game.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes, riding a 15-game playoff winning streak after sweeping Quesnel Millionaires 5-1 for the Mowatt Cup, will host Alberta champion Red Deer Rustlers in the first game of a best-of-seven Centennial Cup elimination series on Tuesday night at Richmond Arena. Red Deer advanced through Alberta competition, defeating Calgary Spurs, Calgary Canucks, and St. Albert Saints in consecutive series.
